response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced full-stack software engineer but lacks the deep, recent C++ expertise and industrial automation background required for this role. His recent work focuses heavily on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with his only professional C++ experience being a 7-month stint over a decade ago. Furthermore, he lacks exposure to the required industrial security standards and IoT protocols.
strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience with strong architectural and microservices knowledge.
Proven leadership and mentoring skills, including organizing workshops and founding an open-source platform.
Familiarity with high-performance, concurrent programming concepts using asynchronous I/O and fibers.
concerns: Severe lack of recent or extensive C++ and STL experience, which is the primary technical requirement.
No background in industrial automation, IoT protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA), or IEC 62443 security standards.
Technical skillset is heavily skewed towards web development rather than low-level or embedded systems.
